mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sub_station_air (station_name, addr, install_year, mang_name, item, dm_x, dm_y, city) VALUES (#{stationName}, #{addr}, #{year}, #{mangName}, #{item}, #{dmX}, #{dmY}, #{city}) ON CONFLICT (station_name) DO UPDATE SET addr = EXCLUDED.addr, install_year = EXCLUDED.install_year, mang_name = EXCLUDED.mang_name, item = EXCLUDED.item, dm_x = EXCLUDED.dm_x, dm_y = EXCLUDED.dm_y, city = EXCLUDED.city, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP

INSERT INTO sub_station_air (station_name, addr, install_year, mang_name, item, dm_x, dm_y, city) VALUES (#{stationName}, #{addr}, NULLIF(#{year}, '')::integer, #{mangName}, #{item}, NULLIF(#{dmX}, '')::numeric, NULLIF(#{dmY}, '')::numeric, #{city})
mapper.update: UPDATE sub_station_air SET station_name = #{stationName}, addr = #{addr}, install_year = NULLIF(#{year}, '')::integer, mang_name = #{mangName}, item = #{item}, dm_x = NULLIF(#{dmX}, '')::numeric, dm_y = NULLIF(#{dmY}, '')::numeric, city = #{city}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE station_id = #{stationId}::bigint
mapper.select:
SELECT station_id, station_name, addr, city, install_year AS year, mang_name, item, dm_x, dm_y, tm, created_at, updated_at FROM sub_station_air
AND city = #{city}
AND ( station_name LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR addr LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR mang_name LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' )
ORDER BY city, station_id
SELECT station_name FROM sub_station_air ORDER BY station_name
SELECT DISTINCT s.station_name FROM sub_history_air h JOIN sub_station_air s ON s.station_id = h.station_id WHERE h.data_time BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime}

SELECT group_key, group_label, COUNT(*) AS data_count, ROUND(AVG(pm10_value)::numeric, 1) AS pm10_avg, ROUND(AVG(pm25_value)::numeric, 1) AS pm25_avg, ROUND(AVG(o3_value)::numeric, 4) AS o3_avg, ROUND(AVG(no2_value)::numeric, 4) AS no2_avg, ROUND(AVG(co_value)::numeric, 2) AS co_avg, ROUND(AVG(so2_value)::numeric, 4) AS so2_avg FROM ( SELECT pm10_value, pm25_value, o3_value, no2_value, co_value, so2_value,
LPAD(EXTRACT(HOUR FROM data_time)::text, 2, '0') AS group_key, EXTRACT(HOUR FROM data_time)::int::text || '시' AS group_label
TO_CHAR(data_time, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS group_key, TO_CHAR(data_time, 'MM월 DD일') AS group_label
LPAD(EXTRACT(MONTH FROM data_time)::text, 2, '0') AS group_key, EXTRACT(MONTH FROM data_time)::int::text || '월' AS group_label
EXTRACT(DOW FROM data_time)::int::text AS group_key, CASE EXTRACT(DOW FROM data_time)::int WHEN 0 THEN '일요일' WHEN 1 THEN '월요일' WHEN 2 THEN '화요일' WHEN 3 THEN '수요일' WHEN 4 THEN '목요일' WHEN 5 THEN '금요일' ELSE '토요일' END AS group_label
CASE WHEN EXTRACT(MONTH FROM data_time) IN (3,4,5) THEN '1' WHEN EXTRACT(MONTH FROM data_time) IN (6,7,8) THEN '2' WHEN EXTRACT(MONTH FROM data_time) IN (9,10,11) THEN '3' ELSE '4' END AS group_key, CASE WHEN EXTRACT(MONTH FROM data_time) IN (3,4,5) THEN '봄' WHEN EXTRACT(MONTH FROM data_time) IN (6,7,8) THEN '여름' WHEN EXTRACT(MONTH FROM data_time) IN (9,10,11) THEN '가을' ELSE '겨울' END AS group_label
FROM sub_history_air WHERE station_id = #{stationId} ) t GROUP BY group_key, group_label ORDER BY group_key

SELECT h.station_id, s.station_name, h.data_time, h.so2_value, h.co_value, h.o3_value, h.no2_value, h.pm10_value, h.pm25_value, h.khai_value FROM sub_history_air h JOIN sub_station_air s ON s.station_id = h.station_id
AND h.station_id = #{stationId}
AND h.data_time >= #{startDate}::timestamp
AND h.data_time <= #{endDate}::timestamp
ORDER BY h.data_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sub_history_air (station_id, data_time, so2_value, co_value, o3_value, no2_value, pm10_value, pm25_value, khai_value) VALUES (#{stationId}, #{dataTime}::timestamp, #{so2Value}, #{coValue}, #{o3Value}, #{no2Value}, #{pm10Value}, #{pm25Value}, #{khaiValue})
mapper.update: UPDATE sub_history_air SET so2_value = #{so2Value}, co_value = #{coValue}, o3_value = #{o3Value}, no2_value = #{no2Value}, pm10_value = #{pm10Value}, pm25_value = #{pm25Value}, khai_value = #{khaiValue} WHERE station_id = #{stationId} AND data_time = #{dataTime}::timestamp
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sub_history_air ( station_id, data_time, so2_value, co_value, o3_value, no2_value, pm10_value, pm25_value, khai_value ) SELECT s.station_id, #{dataTime}, #{so2Value}, #{coValue}, #{o3Value}, #{no2Value}, #{pm10Value}, #{pm25Value}, #{khaiValue} FROM sub_station_air s WHERE s.station_name = #{stationName} ON CONFLICT (station_id, data_time) DO UPDATE SET so2_value = EXCLUDED.so2_value, co_value = EXCLUDED.co_value, o3_value = EXCLUDED.o3_value, no2_value = EXCLUDED.no2_value, pm10_value = EXCLUDED.pm10_value, pm25_value = EXCLUDED.pm25_value, khai_value = EXCLUDED.khai_value
